title: AN ACT TO CONSTITUTE THE SITIOS OF CAMBUÃGATOD AND SOLOP BOTH IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALALORA, PROVINCE OF SAMAR INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO SAN JUAN OF THE SAME MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1680 / 55 OG No. 27, 4976 (July 6, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2205, May 07, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO CONSTITUTE THE SITIOS OF CAMBUÃGATOD AND SOLOP BOTH IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALALORA, PROVINCE OF SAMAR INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO SAN JUAN OF THE SAME MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Cambuñgatod and Solop in the Municipality of Talalora, Province of Samar, are hereby constituted into a barrio to be known as Barrio San Juan of the same municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, May 7, 1959.
